channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree hitting overhead telephone/broadband cable, 13th May
item.description:
The tree growing in the adjacent verge is growing into my overhead telephone/broadband cable at 18 Cakebridge Road risking cable breakage, especially during high winds. This has been becoming progressively worse as the tree grows and looks like this year’s growth may overwhelm the cable. Please take urgent corrective action to cut the tree back before the cable is broken. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Cakebridge Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light sensor is not detecting vehicles problem, 13th May
item.description:
Works ref: HM7532534959-02 Seems like light system is not working. Out of sync and may have been twisted around. Someone needs to take a look at these lights.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Light sensor is not detecting vehicles

item.title: Curb has come away a from the path, 13th May
item.description:
This is directly outside 15 Orchard Way. The high rise curb in front of the parking space has eroded away. It would be appreciated to consider upon fixing the issue to lower the curb to prevent this issue reoccurring. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Orchard Way, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees overhanging the footpath, 13th May
item.description:
Taller people moving to road because of low hanging trees from Francis Close Hall.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 62, Swindon Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small lightweight branches on gutter of road and pavement outside 2C Dinglewell, 13th May
item.description:
Fallen off tree today
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dinglewell, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree on grass verge is dead and dropping branches, 13th May
item.description:
Tree on grass verge outside number 24 is dead and dropping branches
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Collum End Rise, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Faded white line, 13th May
item.description:
6 Ewlyn Road, Cheltenham, GL53 7PB

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Ewlyn Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: Overgrown tree causing blind spots, 13th May
item.description:
These trees are over gown around the bottom and causing blind spots when pulling out of sydenham road north junction. If a cyclist/motor bike was in one of these blind spots they would not be seen by a car at the junction
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Cranham Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vegetation obstructing view when pulling out of junction, 13th May
item.description:
The trees on both sides of this junction are very overgrown and leafy at the bottom. When pulling out onto the main road there is very little/no visibility of oncoming traffic, the growth on the trees is causing big blind spots
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Cranham Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grill cover bars on kerb side all corroded away except 1. Could give way any time., 13th May
item.description:
Outside 1 Gretton Rd, Gotherington GL52 9EP. Presumably gradually deteriorated over a long period.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Gretton Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 13th May
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure please replace x1 broken rocking sunken x1 900x600x20 mm slab number 1 (FW Broken Slabs)
Report on FixMyStreet
